subject: A dramatic waterfall cascading down a sheer red-rock cliff into a churning pool below, with mist rising at the base
description: A towering waterfall pours down a steep, sun-warmed sandstone cliff face in a narrow gorge. The water is a frothing white ribbon down the center, splashing into a turbulent blue-green pool at the base where mist and spray rise into the air. The rock walls are layered in warm reds, oranges, and ochres, lit from above so the upper edge glows nearly gold while the depths of the canyon fall into cooler shadow. No figures are present — this is a pure landscape vista emphasizing scale, vertical drop, and the meeting of water and stone.
foreground: Churning blue-green plunge pool at the base of the falls with rising white mist and wet rock
background: Sheer red sandstone cliff walls rising into sunlit upper rim, cascading waterfall down the center
emotion: awe at natural grandeur; quiet, untouched wilderness
